title: Jujutsu Blocks (JJK)
description: My take on Jujutsu Kaisen in minecraft!
body:
This mod is my attempt at implementing many features from jujutsu kaisen into minecraft :)
Currently includes six innate techniques with more planned:
- Limitless
- Boogie Woogie (Completed)
- Puppet Manipulation
- Blood Manipulation
- Finger Bearer (Completed)
- Teleportation (Completed)
- Exploding Flesh

And other features:
- Cursed tools
- Mobs from the anime including curses and sorcerers (and some custom mobs)
- Structures
- Reverse Curse Technique and Six eyes!
- Permadeath system (Toggleable with a gamerule)
- Many gamerules to customise your experience

Fight curses, sorcerer's and even players to increase your power and rise through the grades to become the strongest sorcerer there is!

Join the discord to keep up to date with the mod, report bugs and give me suggestions https://discord.gg/ndZ97GJ9MG

PLEASE NOTE THAT ALL ASSETS AND FEATURES ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE, THIS IS JUST A BETA
